description:
Creates single Equipment Log.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments
* Locations

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

hours_idle.description: Number of hours the Equipment was idle

hours_operating.description: Number of hours the Equipment was in operation

position.description: Order in which this entry was recorded for the day

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

equipment.description: Equipment of Equipment (Legacy) Tool. Can't be present at the same time with 'equipment_register' field

equipment_register.description: Equipment of Equipment Register (Beta) Tool. Can't be present at the same time with 'equipment' field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition
Data type of the Custom Field Definition

attachments.description: Equipment Log Attachments are not viewable or used on web

400.description: Can not create due to errors

403.description: User does not have right permissions

datetime.description: Datetime of record. Mutually exclusive with the date property.

hours_idle.description: Number of hours the Equipment was idle

hours_operating.description: Number of hours the Equipment was in operation

inspected.description: Inspection status of Equipment before operation

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Inspection Log. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.

equipment_id.description: Equipment ID. This params is accepted only if project uses Equipment Legacy tool. Use equipment_register_id param if project uses Equipment Beta tool.

equipment_name.description: Equipment name. This Equipment will create on the fly if it doesn't exist and will take precedence over Equipment ID. This params is accepted only if project uses Equipment Legacy tool. Use equipme...

equipment_register_id.description: This params is accepted only if project uses Equipment Beta tool. Use equipment_id OR equipment_name param if project uses Equipment Legacy tool.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...

vendor_id.description: ID of the Vendor associated to the equipment log

attachments.description: Equipment Log Attachments. To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` as fi...

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.
